segments.text: For your pleasure in our present state
Part false, part true like anything
But you'll wake up soon and fight
I hope things will turn out right

transcription.text:
For your pleasure in our present state
 Part false, part true like anything
 We present ourselves
 The words we use tumble
 All over your shoulder
 Gravel hard and loose
 There all night, lying
 With your dark horse hiding
 Upholding such extremes

 You're rubbing shoulders
 With the stars at night
 Shining so bright
 Getting older
 But you'll wake up soon and fight
 In the morning
 Things you worried about
 Last night will seem lighter
 I hope things will turn out right

 Oh, my
 Through every step I change
 You watch me walk away
 Ta-da

 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da)

 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da)
 (Ta-da, ta-da, ta-da, ta-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da-da, ta-da-da-da-da)

segments.text: In every dream home a heartache
You float in my new pool
My role is to serve you
For your pleasure in our present state
Part false, part true, like anything
With the stars at night, shining so bright
But you'll wake up soon and fight
Things you worried about last night
I hope things will turn out right
You don't ask why. (Well, well, well)
